business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership and operation, including warehouse, distribution, manufacturing, and office facilities

coverages_discussed.notes: Total Insured Value across 9 locations includes Building, Contents, and BI values

positives: Majority of locations are Non-Combustible or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Modern construction with several buildings built post-2000
Corporate office is Fire Resistive construction
Low claims frequency with only 1 claim in past 4 years prior to 2024
concerns: LOC-007 Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2 is not sprinklered
Dayton Manufacturing Facility (LOC-004) is Joisted Masonry construction built in 1992
Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2 built in 1998 (older manufacturing occupancy without sprinklers)
All locations concentrated in Ohio - geographic concentration risk
Two property claims with $238,554 total incurred
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 property claims with total paid of $202,875 and total incurred of $238,554. Only 1 claim reported across prior 4 policy years (2021).
